case_title: PATEL, K. vs. DOMINGUEZ, REYNOLDO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, K. SERVED AUG-11-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGUEZ, REYNOLDO RODRIGUEZ, JEROME
